title: Milkman's Nukes
description: Its adds bombs to blow stuff up. More coming in future.
body:
Welcome to Milkman's Nukes! Right now we only have 3 nukes and 3 bombs. I recommend using JEI to figure out the recipes but for those who want them here they are:

**_[Join the discord server to report bugs!~](https://discord.gg/hEQYJASyMG)_**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Nuke Core:**

The nuke core is used for the middle of the nuke. Because every good nuke needs a core.


**Charged Nuke Core:**

A more powerful core for more powerful nukes.


**Nuke:**

The actual nuke with the cool features.


**Fat Man:**

More powerful nuke than the OG nuke.


**Little Boy:**

More powerful than the OG nuke but less powerful than the Fat Man


**Bomb Computer:**

Lets you bomb multiple bombs at once! (Also stores them for you!)


**Pipe Bomb:**

Right click to blow it up


**Clocked Pipe Bomb:**

Pipe bomb but you can time it using the GUI.

**TNT Arrow:**

Blows up when shot


**TNT Bow:**

 Shoots TNT arrows.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
How To Use:
Right click to open the GUI. Then put the cords of where you wanna bomb and press the bomb button.

Have fun bombing villages and your friends houses!!
